name: UB Service Core
description: UB Service Core delivers five open-source cluster-level services for UnifiedBus SuperPoDs, boosting app performance 30-50% with peer-to-peer architecture.
featureList: UB Service Core Engine (UBS Engine): Resource pooling and dynamic scheduling for memory and DPU resources, distributed automatic primary node selection, N-1 HA, core control-plane reference implementation for the UB computing system.
UB Service Core Virt (UBS Virt): Virtualization pooling, live migration policy decision-making, quick disaster recovery, and efficient VM/container communication.
UB Service Core Memory (UBS Mem): Unified memory semantics programming for memory sharing and pooling of UB-based SuperPoDs.
UB Service Core Communication (UBS Comm): High-performance, high-reliability, ecosystem-compatible communication protocols (user-space socket/Verbs over UB) on UB-based SuperPoDs.
UB Service Core IO (UBS IO): High-level I/O services for application-affinity global data read/write caching systems (SSU passthrough and KV cache) based on SuperPoDs.

hasPart.name: UB Service Core Engine
hasPart.description: Provides resource pooling and dynamic scheduling for memory and DPU resources, supports distributed automatic primary node selection, and implements N-1 HA. Serves as the core control-plane reference implementation for the UB computing system.

hasPart.name: UB Service Core Virt
hasPart.description: Supports virtualization pooling, live migration policy decision-making, quick disaster recovery, and efficient VM/container communication, improving virtualization performance.

hasPart.name: UB Service Core Memory
hasPart.description: Supports unified memory semantics programming to implement memory sharing and pooling of UB-based SuperPoDs.

hasPart.name: UB Service Core Communication
hasPart.description: Provides high-performance, high-reliability, and ecosystem-compatible (user-space socket/Verbs over UB) communication protocols built on UB-based SuperPoDs.

hasPart.name: UB Service Core IO
hasPart.description: Provides high-level I/O services for application-affinity global data read/write caching systems (such as SSU passthrough and KV cache) based on SuperPoDs.

name: UB Service Core: Cluster Services for SuperPoDs | openEuler
description: UB Service Core delivers five open-source cluster-level services for UnifiedBus SuperPoDs, boosting app performance 30-50% with peer-to-peer architecture.
